title: Compound V Tweaks
description: Compound V Tweaks is an addon for the Compound V mod that expands the experience with new powers, lab systems, quality-of-life features, JEI support, and extra tools for testing and configuring powers.
body:
Compound V Tweaks is an addon for the Compound V mod that expands the experience with new powers, lab systems, quality-of-life features, JEI support, and extra tools for testing and configuring powers.

This addon adds new custom powers, improved power tips, scanner and book interfaces, lab crafting machines, stasis recovery features, targeted V systems, and compatibility improvements for the latest Compound V version.

Current Features

Custom addon powers including Blood Control, Thermal Overload, Plasma Threading, Construct Skin, Bone Spikes, Wound Transfer, and Flesh Forge

A Vought Control Book for creative/admin use, allowing presets and power selection without manually editing config files

Improved power names so effects display the actual power name instead of only “Compound V”

Power tips above the hotbar, toggleable with J

Power scanner GUI for checking active powers and Anti-V/stasis status

Lab progression systems for researching and crafting advanced V-related items

JEI support for addon machine recipes

Improved Speedster controls, including adjustable speed and water running

Stasis Pod recovery system for restoring old powers after Anti-V

Flesh Forge Note

Flesh Forge currently uses GeckoLib for its larger visual form. This part is still a work in progress, but I decided to include it early so players can try it and see where the power is going. Expect its model, animations, and abilities to improve in future updates.

Required Mods

Compound V

GeckoLib

Optional but Recommended

JEI, for viewing addon recipes and machine processes

Future Plans

More powers are already being worked on and will be released soon. Feedback and suggestions for future addon content are welcome.
